fallback_contact.title: Aecon Construction Group employee — Winnipeg-based
fallback_contact.rationale: Identified on LinkedIn as Winnipeg-based Aecon employee; only public name confirmed in Winnipeg. Aecon's Winnipeg presence is heavy civil/transmission utilities (lower fit for commercial painting). Aecon has active Sr. Estimator, Transmission and Jr. Estimator postings in Winnipeg — phone the office and ask for the Winnipeg estimating department.

needs_review_flags: Aecon Winnipeg is utilities/transmission-focused, not vertical commercial — likely lower fit for Ashrah's painting services

Manual LinkedIn lookup likely needed to identify the actual Winnipeg estimator(s)

sources.claim: Aecon has Senior Estimator role in Winnipeg (Transmission)
